transcript:
Speaker A (Robot): मैं सो रही हूँ। [I am sleeping.]
Speaker B (Man): I am sleeping.
Speaker A (Robot): क्या तुम सो रहे हो? [Are you sleeping?]
Speaker B (Man): Are you sleeping?
Speaker A (Robot): कौन सो रहा है? [Who is sleeping?]
Speaker B (Man): Who is sleeping?
Speaker A (Robot): क्या तुम सोना चाहते हो? [Do you want to sleep?]
Speaker B (Man): Do you want to sleep?
Speaker A (Robot): क्या तुम आना चाहते हो? [Do you want to come?]
Speaker B (Man): Do you want to come?
Speaker A (Robot): Very good. तुम्हारी English तो बहुत अच्छी है। [Very good. Your English is very good.]
Speaker B (Man): Thank you, teacher.
Speaker A (Robot): तुमने English बोलना कहाँ से सीखा? [Where did you learn to speak English?]
Speaker B (Man): Teacher, वो मैंने MySivi app से सीखा। [Teacher, I learned that from MySivi app.]
Speaker A (Robot): MySivi app? वो क्या है? [MySivi app? What is that?]
Speaker B (Man): MySivi app पे ना सिर्फ English बोलना सिखाया जाता है, वहाँ AI teachers इतने अच्छे से सिखाते हैं कि English सीखना बच्चों का खेल लगता है। [On MySivi app, not only is English speaking taught, but AI teachers teach so well that learning English feels like child's play.]
Speaker A (Robot): Fantastic! फिर तो सारे लोगों को MySivi app डाउनलोड कर लेनी चाहिए। [Fantastic! Then everyone should download the MySivi app.]
Speaker B (Man): हाँ teacher, वैसे भी आजकल सारे लोग Instagram पे बहुत टाइम वेस्ट करते हैं, पर मैं नहीं करता। मैं तो वो टाइम MySivi app को देता हूँ, and my English is getting better and better every day. [Yes teacher, anyway nowadays everyone wastes a lot of time on Instagram, but I don't. I give that time to MySivi app, and my English is getting better and better every day.]
Speaker A (Robot): ये फिर हमारे सारे लोगों को यूज़ करना चाहिए। Install Now पे क्लिक करो और MySivi app डाउनलोड करो। [Then all our people should use this. Click on Install Now and download the MySivi app.]

I am going to the gym in the evening.
ARYA AI Teacher: You're really close! You can say, "I'm going to the gym this evening." That sounds like a great way to relax! What do you enjoy most about going to the gym?

summary: An AI robot tests a man's English translation skills, praising his accuracy. The man credits his fluency to the MySivi app, highlighting its interactive AI teachers and structured learning path. The ad concludes with a call to action to download the app instead of wasting time on social media.
